Follows a comprehensive step-by-step workflow: Architecture Overview -> Step 1 (Install ArgoCD) -> Step 2 (Register Clusters) -> Step 3 (Git Repo Structure) -> Step 4 (Projects/RBAC) -> Step 5 (Application Definitions with Sync Policies) -> Step 6 (ApplicationSet) -> Step 7 (Notifications) -> Step 8 (Promotion Workflow) -> Step 9 (Secrets Management) -> Step 10 (Health Checks/Monitoring) -> Step 11 (Applying Everything). This is a decision-tree based setup workflow.

The entire response is organized as 11 numbered steps from installation through monitoring. Each step contains detailed sub-steps.
